title: polygala vulgaris var. lensaei
intro: Polygala vulgaris var. lensaei is a variant of the Polygala vulgaris plant, commonly known as common or povertyweed, which belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris var. lensaei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the dried plant as a tincture in traditional herbal medicine.
